name: PAY_BALANCE_BATCH_LINES
query: SELECT pbl.BATCH_ID, pbl.BATCH_LINE_ID, pbl.BATCH_LINE_STATUS, pbl.GROUPING_ID, pbl.GROUPING_VALUE, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP'), TO_NUMBER(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE), NULL)) AS PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','BALANCE_DIMENSION'), TO_NUMBER(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE), NULL)) AS BALANCE_DIMENSION_ID, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','BALANCE_TYPE'), TO_NUMBER(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE), NULL)) AS BALANCE_TYPE_ID, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','PERSON_PROCESS'), TO_NUMBER(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE), NULL)) AS PAYROLL_REL_ACTION_ID, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','VALUE'), TO_NUMBER(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE), NULL)) AS VALUE, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','UPLOAD_DATE'), TO_DATE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS'), NULL)) AS UPLOAD_DATE, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','BALANCE'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS BALANCE_NAME, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','DIMENSION_NAME'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS DIMENSION_NAME, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_NUMBER'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_NUMBER, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','TERM_NUMBER'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS TERM_NUMBER, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','PAYROLL_TERM'), TO_NUMBER(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE), NULL)) AS PAYROLL_TERM_ID, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','ASSIGNMENT_NUMBER'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS ASSIGNMENT_NUMBER, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','PAYROLL_ASSIGNMENT'), TO_NUMBER(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE), NULL)) AS PAYROLL_ASSIGNMENT_ID, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','LEGAL_EMPLOYER_NAME'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS LEGAL_EMPLOYER_NAME, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','LEGAL_EMPLOYER'), TO_NUMBER(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE), NULL)) AS LEGAL_EMPLOYER_ID, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','ELEMENT_ENTRY'), TO_NUMBER(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE), NULL)) AS ELEMENT_ENTRY_ID, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','PAYROLL_NAME'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS PAYROLL_NAME, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','PAYROLL'), TO_NUMBER(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE), NULL)) AS PAYROLL_ID, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','AREA_ONE'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS AREA1, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','AREA_TWO'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS AREA2, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','AREA_THREE'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS AREA3, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','AREA_FOUR'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS AREA4, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','THIRD_PARTY_PAYEE_NAME'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS THIRD_PARTY_PAYEE_NAME, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','THIRD_PARTY_PAYEE'), TO_NUMBER(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE), NULL)) AS THIRD_PARTY_PAYEE_ID, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','TIME_DEFINITION_NAME'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS TIME_DEFINITION_NAME, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','TIME_DEFINITION'), TO_NUMBER(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE), NULL)) AS TIME_DEFINITION_ID, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','CALCULATION_BREAKDOWN'), TO_NUMBER(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE), NULL)) AS CALC_BREAKDOWN_ID, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','BALANCE_DATE'), TO_DATE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS'), NULL)) AS BALANCE_DATE, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','TAX_REPORTING_UNIT_NAME'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS TAX_UNIT_NAME, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','TAX_REPORTING_UNIT'), TO_NUMBER(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE), NULL)) AS TAX_UNIT_ID, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','RUN_TYPE_NAME'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS RUN_TYPE_NAME, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','RUN_TYPE'), TO_NUMBER(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE), NULL)) AS RUN_TYPE_ID, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','CONTEXT_ONE_NAME'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS CONTEXT1_NAME, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','CONTEXT_ONE'), TO_NUMBER(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE), NULL)) AS CONTEXT1_ID, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','CONTEXT_ONE_VALUE'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS CONTEXT1_VALUE, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','CONTEXT_TWO_NAME'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS CONTEXT2_NAME, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','CONTEXT_TWO'), TO_NUMBER(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE), NULL)) AS CONTEXT2_ID, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','CONTEXT_TWO_VALUE'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS CONTEXT2_VALUE, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','CONTEXT_THREE_NAME'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS CONTEXT3_NAME, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','CONTEXT_THREE'), TO_NUMBER(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE), NULL)) AS CONTEXT3_ID, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','CONTEXT_THREE_VALUE'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS CONTEXT3_VALUE, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','CONTEXT_FOUR_NAME'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS CONTEXT4_NAME, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','CONTEXT_FOUR'), TO_NUMBER(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE), NULL)) AS CONTEXT4_ID, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','CONTEXT_FOUR_VALUE'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS CONTEXT4_VALUE, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','CONTEXT_FIVE_NAME'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS CONTEXT5_NAME, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','CONTEXT_FIVE'), TO_NUMBER(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE), NULL)) AS CONTEXT5_ID, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','CONTEXT_FIVE_VALUE'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS CONTEXT5_VALUE, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','CONTEXT_SIX_NAME'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS CONTEXT6_NAME, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','CONTEXT_SIX'), TO_NUMBER(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE), NULL)) AS CONTEXT6_ID, MAX(DECODE(pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_ID, PAY_BATCH_LDR_PKG.get_param_id(pbh.legislative_data_group_id,'BALANCE','BALANCE_INITIALIZATION','CONTEXT_SIX_VALUE'), pblv.ACTION_PARAMETER_VALUE, NULL)) AS CONTEXT6_VALUE FROM PAY_BATCH_LINES pbl, PAY_BATCH_LINE_VALUES pblv, pay_batch_headers pbh WHERE pbl.BATCH_LINE_ID = pblv.BATCH_LINE_ID AND pbh.batch_id=pbl.batch_id GROUP BY pbl.BATCH_ID, pbl.BATCH_LINE_ID, pbl.BATCH_LINE_STATUS, pbl.GROUPING_ID, pbl.GROUPING_VALUE
